briefing.headline: Vertical and precise — winter stained conditions call for reaction baits on deep structure.
briefing.gameplan:
In winter with stained water and post frontal conditions, reaction presentations shine.

KVD: Blade bait is my #1 bait for covering water in super cold water. Fish get locked on the bottom — short hop it on edges, drops, outside edges of flats and weed lines. Use just heavy enough to get to the zone. Great for largemouth, smallmouth, and spots.

Key adjustment for post frontal: slow down significantly — extended pauses, subtle movements, finesse presentations.

primaryApproach.retrieve: KVD: Blade bait is my #1 bait for covering water in super cold water. Fish get locked on the bottom — short hop it on edges, drops, outside edges of flats and weed lines. Use just heavy enough to get
primaryApproach.targets: Focus on flat, creek channel, grass. Work the transitions and edges where structure changes.

alternateApproach.retrieve: Match the conditions — slow down significantly — extended pauses, subtle movements, finesse presentations.
alternateApproach.targets: Focus on flat, creek channel, grass. Work the transitions and edges where structure changes.

proInsights.insight: KVD: '2008 Classic at Hartwell — brutal cold Day 1, hammered them cranking a weighted-to-suspend Series 5 over 15-25ft with stop-and-start retrieve. Day 2, post-frontal sunny skies killed that bite. Ran to the upper end with stained water and fish...

Wheeler: Uses Lowrance HDS LIVE 12 to find bass in deep wintering holes or around brush piles, then drops a Jigging Rap for vertical presentation; targets bass that are grouped together and competing for food.

briefing.depthStrategy: Post-frontal winter is the toughest bite of the year. Fish retreat to the deepest structure available (20-35ft+) and barely move. Target steep structure where fish can access deep water without traveling — bluffs, vertical channel walls, bridge pilings.
adjustIf: If skies cloud up and wind picks up, re-introduce moving baits — the reprieve from high pressure activates fish
If water clears significantly, downsize presentations and move to natural color patterns
